name: protein-lab
description: Dry-lab task intake, experiment planning, local rounds, Modal compute, Tamarind/PepMLM and AF Server tools, collaboration, reporting, and guardrails for Protein Lab.

interface.longDescription: Protein Lab helps Codex triage life-science dry-lab tasks, plan experiments, manage local rounds, run tool-specific workflows, work with collaboration platforms, interpret raw evidence, write Chinese reports, and capture project-specific guardrails. It includes Modal compute workflows for custom CPU/GPU pilots, AlphaFold Server workflows, Tamarind Bio API, and PepMLM peptide-candidate generation, result auditing, and conservative shortlist handoff.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me triage and run a Protein Lab dry-lab task.
